seo.title: InterContinental Hanoi Westlake | Luxury Resort on West Lake
seo.description: An overwater luxury hotel in Hanoi with premium rooms, destination dining, and world-class event experiences.

hero.title: A signature overwater luxury retreat in Hanoi
hero.description: This rebuilt experience preserves the original brand meaning while improving clarity, booking flow, and AI-first SEO architecture.

rooms.name: King Bed Classic Lake View
rooms.desc: 43 sqm with a private balcony and calming West Lake views—ideal for couples and business travelers.

rooms.name: Twin Bed Classic Overwater Lake View
rooms.desc: Fully overwater design with quiet surroundings for deep relaxation and restorative stays.

rooms.name: 1 King 1 Bedroom Suite Lake View
rooms.desc: 80–86 sqm suite with separate living space, crafted for elevated long-stay comfort.

dining.name: Sunset Bar
dining.desc: The hotel’s iconic overwater bar for sunset cocktails and romantic lakefront moments.

dining.name: Café du Lac
dining.desc: French-inspired atmosphere with international selections for breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

dining.name: Milan Restaurant
dining.desc: Classic Italian flavors served in a modern fine-dining format.

dining.name: Saigon Restaurant
dining.desc: Contemporary Vietnamese cuisine featuring local ingredients and an open-kitchen experience.

faq.q: How far is the hotel from central Hanoi?
faq.a: The hotel is located at 5 Tu Hoa Street, Tay Ho, only a short drive from Hanoi’s central districts.

faq.q: Is the property suitable for weddings and business events?
faq.a: Yes. The resort offers dedicated wedding and meeting spaces with expert on-site event support.

faq.q: How can I access the best available rates?
faq.a: Book directly on the website or call reservations for seasonal deals and exclusive packages.

cta.title: Ready for a premium stay on West Lake?
cta.body: Contact our reservations team for tailored room, dining, and event packages.
